title: the count() return null while expect 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
CREATE TABLE t3 ( ref_id INT REFERENCES t2(id), description TEXT NOT NULL );
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE ref_id IS NULL), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL), 0);
key_bug_features: count() returns null instead of zero
